description: A candid, undesigned photograph (no on-image text) of a large American flag hung vertically across the facade of a tan/limestone mid-century government office building, likely a federal building in Washington. The photo is shot from below looking up; the building has rows of recessed dark windows in a regular grid. The sky behind is a soft pinkish-purple at golden hour / dusk with wispy clouds. Patriotic red-white-and-blue bunting is partially visible draped along the lower edge of the building at bottom right. The image is a straightforward atmospheric patriotic photograph used to accompany an evening 'Stay Strong, Patriots' message; it has warm/golden lighting matching the tweet's 'Golden Hour in the Golden Age' caption, but contains no graphic design, slogans, seals, or meme elements. Marked is_designed=false: it is a plain scenic/patriotic photo rather than a designed meme or poster.
